itemName.zh: FORT Redut-T5 防弹衣（烟雾迷彩）

description.zh: 伙计，没了你我这活儿都干不下去。我竭尽身心做这些事儿，就是为了让这城市照常运转，我的每一步动作都是为了这个。现在我打算开始进行成衣制造，主要生产和销售胸挂，枪套和防弹衣。哈哈，我这可是全欧洲最时髦的时装店。这次我得搞清楚6B13的结构和材质，试一试它能坏成什么样子。就和上次一样，给我带来个把这样的防弹衣，一件完好的，一件坏得厉害一点。
description.en: Oh, brother, I’d be neck-deep in work without you. I'm doing it all so the city keeps on living, mind you, that’s why I do all the moves. Alright, I'll tell you about my secret affair, since it has been going so smoothly so far. I’m thinking of setting up garment manufacture, to sew and sell vests, holsters, armor. As in the best fashion houses in Europe, haha. This time I need to understand what exactly is inside the 6B13 armor, the green one, it's also heavy as shit, you probably know. I want to figure out how it breaks down, and what it’s based on. Just like the last time, bring me a couple of those, one totaled, and one a bit more pristine.

545cdb794bdc2d3a198b456a.zh: 6B43 Zabralo-Sh 防弹衣（数码丛林迷彩）
6B43 Zabralo-Sh 防弹衣（数码丛林迷彩）

name.en: Living High is Not a Crime - Part 1
